channel.title: NATO_NPG_metadata.v4
channel.generator: Webpage HTML Export plugin for Obsidian

item.title: NPG-D(73)12-COR1_ENG
item.description: This document is a formal correction to a previous Nuclear Planning Group document dated October 9, 1973.
item.guid: NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1 NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1973/NPG-D(73)12-COR1_ENG.md

item.title: NPG-D(73)11_ENG
item.description: This report by the Permanent Representatives of the Nuclear Planning Group provides a commentary on the operational concepts and doctrine governing the tactical employment of nuclear weapons within the North Atlantic Treaty Organization.
item.guid: NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1 NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1973/NPG-D(73)11_ENG.md

item.title: NPG-D(73)10_ENG
item.description: This report examines and provides recommendations to strengthen the political consultation process regarding the use of nuclear weapons by the North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO) during times of tension or hostilities.
item.guid: NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1 NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1973/NPG-D(73)10_ENG.md

item.title: NPG-D(73)13_ENG
item.description: The Nuclear Planning Group reports on the progress of improving political consultation procedures and communication facilities for the use of nuclear weapons during times of tension or hostilities.
item.guid: NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1 NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1973/NPG-D(73)13_ENG.md

item.title: NPG-D(73)12_ENG
item.description: This report by the Permanent Representatives of the Nuclear Planning Group discusses the political and military implications of employing NATO conventional and nuclear capabilities in a combined manner at an early stage of a conflict.
item.guid: NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1 NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1973/NPG-D(73)12_ENG.md

item.title: CONTENT
item.description: Table6 resultsSort0Filter1PropertiesSearchNewShowing 6archive_codeTitlesummaryNPG/D(73)10Nuclear Planning Group: Consultation Procedures and Facilities Detailed Examination of Selected AspectsThis report examines and provides recommendations to strengthen the political consultation process regarding the use of nuclear weapons by the North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO) during times of tension or hostilities.NPG/D(73)11NATO Operational Concepts and Doctrine Currently Governing Employment of Nuclear Weapons for Tactical PurposesThis report by the Permanent Representatives of the Nuclear Planning Group provides a commentary on the operational concepts and doctrine governing the tactical employment of nuclear weapons within the North Atlantic Treaty Organization.NPG/D(73)12Early Combined Use of NATO Conventional and Nuclear CapabilitiesThis report by the Permanent Representatives of the Nuclear Planning Group discusses the political and military implications of employing NATO conventional and nuclear capabilities in a combined manner at an early stage of a conflict.NPG/D(73)12-COR1Corrigendum to Document NPG/D(73)12This document is a formal correction to a previous Nuclear Planning Group document dated October 9, 1973.NPG/D(73)/13Consultation Procedures and FacilitiesThe Nuclear Planning Group reports on the progress of improving political consultation procedures and communication facilities for the use of nuclear weapons during times of tension or hostilities.NPG/D(73)15Nuclear Planning Group Follow-On Use Work Programme Status of Work in Progress as of 1st October, 1973This report by the Permanent Representatives of the Nuclear Planning Group provides an update on the progress of the study regarding the follow-on tactical use of nuclear weapons.

item.guid: NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1 NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1973/pdf/NPG-D(73)13_ENG.PDF

item.title: NPG-D(73)15_ENG

item.title: NPG-D(73)11_ENG
item.guid: NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1 NPG - Nuclear Planning Group/1973/pdf/NPG-D(73)11_ENG.PDF
